#Summary1=(human1) On her channel, Shawnta's Way, Shawnta presents her new Nourished by Shawnta Curl Defining and Soft Hold Styler, which is a buttery hair cream with sesame seed oil, rose essence, coconut, honey and horsetail, and her Angelic Clear Coarse Jelly, a hair gel with aloe and rosemary.

#Summary2=(claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022; postedited) Beauty influencer Shawnta introduces her new 'Angelic Coco' hair product line, featuring a moisturizing curl cream with honey and botanicals and a light-hold defining jelly enriched with aloe vera, both designed to promote hair health while styling.

#Summary3=(gpt4o; postedited) Shawnta launches her Angelic Coco line with a Curl Defining Styler and Clear Coarse Jelly, featuring sesame oil and rose essence, and aloe plus rosemary, products focusing on hair health for colder months without strong scents and designed to moisturize, promote growth, and offer natural styling.

#Summary4=(Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct; postedited) Shawnta is introducing her new product line, Angelic Coco, which includes a curl-defining and soft-hold styler and a curl-defining jelly, and she's excited to share them with her audience and explain their ingredients and uses.

#Summary5=(Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct) Shawnta introduces her new Angelic Coco product line, featuring a nourishing curl-defining cream and a hydrating jelly, both rich in natural ingredients like coconut, rose, honey, and herbs, designed to promote hair health alongside styling.
#Text=Hey guys !
#Text=So welcome back to my channel .
#Text=So it 's Shawntas Way here today , and today I 'm going to be talking to you guys about number one : my new product line .

#Text=I have new products out , and I 'm gon na be showing you guys today exactly how I 'm going to be using my products , and I 'm also going to be showing you guys this extreme moisture bomb routine that you can do , um , for wintertime because it is getting a little bit colder outside .
#Text=Um , which you always want to focus on the moisture of your hair , but the colder months in some areas of the world can be brutal .
#Text=Um , it 's not like super cold w- where I am just yet , but it 's getting there , so ignore my hair right now .
#Text=I know it looks kinda crazy .
#Text=I just now got done washing it .
#Text=I 'm gon na tell you guys about that process as well , but first let 's go ahead and get into these products !
#Text=I can not believe that I 'm actually showing you guys these products .
#Text=So this product line is the Angelic Coco line , and I have been working on this line since 2019 .
#Text=Um , as you guys see there 's only two products , but of course I 'm going to be expanding .
#Text=Um , and you guys will see , like , a lot more stuff in the future , but first we want to focus on these two products .

#Text=I wanted to get these out to you guys because you guys have been asking for styling products since the beginning , so I 'm so glad to finally have actual styling products that I can , um , you know , present to you guys .
#Text=So this first product that I 'm going to show you guys is the Nourished by Shawnta Curl Defining and Soft Hold Styler , which is enriched with sesame seed oil and rose essence .
#Text=So it 's the Angelic Coco Curl Creator Cream , and it has coconut plus rose in it .
#Text=So this product is – I just – I love it .
#Text=It 's so moisturizing .
#Text=It 's really really thick .
#Text=You guys can see on the camera it 's super thick .
#Text=Um , it does have like a butter feel to it .
#Text=It 's a cream , but it has a really buttery feel to it .
#Text=And it 's of course white , hence the name " Angelic Coco " .
#Text=The ingredients in here are super jam - packed .
#Text=There 's even honey in here .
#Text=I wanted to make sure that this styler actually contributes to the health of your hair .

#Text=So a lot of times with stylers , they 're just , you know , there to give you a nice style , which is great , but I want to make sure that all my products are geared towards the health of the hair even if they 're styling products .
#Text=So I was , like , not backing down on that part .
#Text=So there are , like , really jam - packed vitamins , nutrients in this formula .
#Text=As I mentioned , one of the ingredients is pure honey , along with a lot more nutrient - dense botanicals and herbs .
#Text=There 's even horsetail in here , which is amazing for hair growth .
#Text=So this is geared towards moisturizing your hair and also hair growth .
#Text=As you guys know , that 's all I talk about on my channel most of the time .
#Text=I really did want to make sure that I infused that into the product as well .
#Text=If you guys are wondering , the smell of this product is very natural .
#Text=It 's very natural , and it does n't have a strong scent .
#Text=With all of my products are normally like a pretty natural smell .
#Text=I do n't put really really strong scents in my products .
#Text=I can just like – I ca n't even begin to tell you how much time and effort I put into this line .
#Text=And , um , I 'm just super excited .
#Text=I just – I do n't know what to say .
#Text=I 'm like " What else can I say ? What else can I say ? "
#Text=I do n't know what to say .
#Text=I 'm just so excited to finally , like , give it to you guys and know that it 's gon na contribute to the actual health of your hair .
#Text=You can use this on twist outs .
#Text=You can use this on braid outs .
#Text=You can even use it on your wash - n - go as well .
#Text=But I will say with wash - n - go's a- on my channel , I always show you guys wash - n - go's where I put a gel on there .

#Text=So I could not come out with a cream and tell you guys just – " You can use it on your wash - n - go's " when that would kinda go against all that I 've always said on my channel , which is " Gels actually are what make your wash - n - go stay . "
#Text=So that brings us to the next product , which is my curl defining jelly .
#Text=I have a gel as well , so it 's not just a cream .
#Text=I have another styler as well , which is a gel .

#Text=So the next product is the Angelic Clear Coarse Jelly with aloe plus rosemary , and it 's a curl - defining and light - to - medium whole jelly , and it 's enriched with aloe vera juice , which is amazing .
#Text=Amazing for hair moisture .
#Text=So with gels – a lot of times you will find gels that kinda , like , dry out your hair .
#Text=Lots of ingredients in it that kinda like counteracts what you would typically want for your hair .
#Text=But a lot of times we kinda , like , deal with it because , you know , the gel is what 's gon na keep our hair in place and make it actually last .
#Text=So I wanted to make a gel that did not do any of those things .
#Text=So this gel is going to give a light - to - medium health .
#Text=You guys already know that – if you follow my channel for a while , you know that I use , like , light defining gels and jellies and stuff all throughout my channel .
#Text=Um , and more of the harder gels that really , like , make your hair feel super hard – I do n't normally use those because I do n't feel like you need all that .
#Text=You just need , like , a nice holding gel .
